clauses_raw.clause_text_raw: Non-residential uses permitted in the DMUN Zone;
Uses permitted in the Park/Cultural Zone;
Apartment Dwellings;
Converted Dwellings;
Educational Institution
Entertainment Establishment;
Fire Station;
Grocery Store;
Hostel;
Hotel;
Lodging House Limited;
Police Station;
Service Repair Establishment;
Shopping Center;
Theatre; and
Veterinary Services.

columns_raw.column_label_raw: Interior/Corner Lots Corner Lots permitted to provide a rear driveway

cells_raw.cell_text_raw: Front and Flankage Yard (Minimum) OR Full Block Developments
Minimum 0 m (0 ft) and Maximum 1.0m (3.3 ft); OR, Within the minimum and maximum range of the Setbacks of existing Buildings on the Block.
Maximum 1.5 m (4.9ft); OR Within the minimum and maximum range of the existing Buildings on the Block.
Not required unless the Side or Rear Yard is abutting a residential, DN or DMU property; in which case the minimum Setback shall be equal to the Setback of the Building on the adjacent property
permitted for properties with Lot Frontages of (82 ft) or greater. Lots permitted to provide a rear driveway from the side Street.

clauses_raw.clause_text_raw: Properties in the DC Zone are eligible for a Bonus Height subject to the following regulations:
A bonus of up to a maximum Building Height of 32.5m (106.6ft).
Lot dimensions:
Minimum Lot Frontage of 18.3 m (60 ft) and minimum Lot Depth of 30.m (98.4ft) for a Building Height up to 21.3 m (69.9 ft).
Minimum Lot Frontage of 41 m (135 ft) and minimum Lot Depth of 36m (118ft) for Buildings taller than 21.3 m (69.9 ft).
Parking Structures are ineligible for a Bonus Height.
Massing for Buildings up to 21.3 m (69.9 ft):
The components above the base Building that are a bonus in Height shall be subject to:
A minimum 3.0m (9.8ft) Stepback from the base Building on the front façade.
A minimum 5.5m (18ft) Side Yard Setback or Stepback to ensure adequate separation distances of the upper levels from adjacent properties that may also be eligible for a Height bonus.
A 45-degree angular planes originating from the top of the flank or rear façade of the base Building that faces abutting properties.
Massing for buildings greater than 21.3 m (69.9 ft):
The components above the base Building that are a bonus in Height shall be subject to:
A minimum 6.0m (19.7ft) Stepback above the base Building or above that portion of the Building that is taller than 21.3 m (69.9 ft) on the front façade.
The portion of the Building above 21.3 m (70 ft) shall have:
A maximum gross floor plate size of 750 sq m (8,072.9 sq ft);
A minimum 10m (32.8ft) interior Yard Setbacks; and
A maximum 25.0m (82ft) Building width addressing the Street.

Where bonus heights are considered on properties subject to a Landmark View Plane as identified in the Official Plan, the additional heights shall not be visible over Province House from the vantage of a pedestrian (1.7m or 5.8ft) facing north on Great George Street at any point between Richmond Street and Dorchester Street.
Bonus Height applications are subject to the provisions in the Bonus Height Applications Section of this by-law.
